tracks.meaning: a parasitic arachnid that attaches to the skin of animals and humans to feed on blood
to make a clicking or ticking sound, especially the sound a clock makes at regular intervals
a mark (✓) placed next to an item to indicate it has been checked or completed
a period or unit of time measured in a game, especially in American football
a bed covering made of strong material filled with straw, feathers, or foam
a person or thing that functions satisfactorily despite being in poor condition
in cricket, a run awarded to the batting team for certain infractions by the fielding team
a light movement or twitching motion
to mark something with a tick or checkmark to indicate selection or approval
